scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-tui && tsgo -p pi/packages/ai/tsconfig.build.json && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-agent-core && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent && npm run build --workspace @beemax/automation && npm run build --workspace @beemax/core && npm run build --workspace @beemax/channel-runtime && npm run build --workspace @beemax/channel-feishu && npm run build --workspace @beemax/channel-telegram && npm run build --workspace @beemax/memory && npm run build --workspace @beemax/knowledge && npm run build --workspace @beemax/feishu-capability && npm run build --workspace @beemax/mcp-capability && npm run build --workspace @beemax/gateway && npm run build --workspace @beemax/cli
scripts.models:update: npm run generate-models --workspace @earendil-works/pi-ai && npm run generate-image-models --workspace @earendil-works/pi-ai
scripts.test: node --test apps/cli/test/*.test.mjs packages/automation/test/*.test.mjs packages/core/test/*.test.mjs packages/channel-runtime/test/*.test.mjs packages/channel-feishu/test/*.test.mjs packages/channel-telegram/test/*.test.mjs packages/memory/test/*.test.mjs packages/knowledge/test/*.test.mjs packages/gateway/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.eval:acceptance: node scripts/evaluate-acceptance-program.mjs && npm run eval:architecture && npm run eval:migration
scripts.verify:release: npm run build && npm run verify:release-boundary && npm run typecheck && npm run eval:stage && npm run eval:agent && npm run eval:capability-ranking && node scripts/verify-live-capability-evidence.mjs && node scripts/verify-live-adaptive-turn-admission.mjs && npm run eval:deployment && npm run eval:runtime && npm run eval:performance:release && npm run eval:memory && npm run eval:reliability && npm run eval:security && npm run eval:acceptance && npm test
